episodes.title: Epstein Is Trump’s ‘Achilles Heel,’ Katie Phang Tells Mehdi
episodes.description:
“There's no such thing as a third term. It'll be a forever term… I think if [Trump] doesn't go in [20]28, I don't think you're going to see judicial intervention… You're going to see a legitimate let-them-eat-cake Marie Antoinette moment.”

In this ‘Mehdi Unfiltered’ interview — Mehdi Hasan sits down with attorney and former MSNBC anchor Katie Phang on set in DC, to unpack the latest in the Epstein scandal and Trump’s destruction of law as he continues to violate the Epstein Files Transparency Act.

They also discuss the upcoming 2026 midterm elections, JD Vance’s relationship with tech billionaires and why Katie thinks Marco Rubio will never become president. Katie also explains why the Supreme Court’s decision against Trump’s tariffs doesn’t prove their independence and breaks down unhinged moments from Trump’s State of the Union address.

This interview published last month on zeteo.com. If you want early, exclusive access to this kind of independent, unfiltered journalism — subscribe to our Substack here: https://zeteo.com/subscribe

episodes.title: Palestine, Epstein and the System of COMPLICITY — UN Insider Speaks Out
episodes.description:
"Israel is getting rid of the Palestinians in the most sadistic way this century could afford. And, it's shocking that no one stops it."

In this Zeteo town hall, Mehdi Hasan sits down with UN Special Rapporteur on the Occupied Palestinian Territories Francesca Albanese who’s had a disinformation campaign waged against her by pro-Israel groups. The smear campaign against Albanese came in the form of a doctored video spread by pro-Israel groups trying to paint her antisemitic.

They also discuss Donald Trump’s ‘Board of Peace,’ her life as a sanctioned official and the link between Jeffrey Epstein and the collapse of multilateralism.

This Zeteo town hall published last week on zeteo.com. If you want early, exclusive access to this kind of independent, unfiltered journalism — subscribe to our Substack here: https://zeteo.com/subscribe

episodes.title: Breaking Down the REAL Conspiracies Behind Epstein and His Elite Circle
episodes.description:
“The real conspiracy is that the rich think that they don't have to live in the same world as the rest of us, so they can let it burn and profit on the way down… These guys believe that they are above the rules. ”

‘Unshocked’ is finally back for 2026! In the first episode of the new year, Zeteo contributor Naomi Klein and Mehdi Hasan discuss how the public comes to believe conspiracy theories and explain what the latest Epstein files say about wealth and power.

In the conversation, they also break down Epstein’s relation with former Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Barak and right-wing billionaire Peter Thiel. They also discuss what Epstein represented, Steve Bannon and accountability in all of this.

You can also listen to ‘Unshocked’ wherever you get your podcasts.
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/episode/0o6EAuNBUCgj8Wlia3b0QK?si=258457ea43204c70

episodes.title: Six New Names Revealed in Epstein Files - Ro Khanna Reacts
episodes.description:
This week, members of Congress were supposed to be able to view the Epstein Files, unredacted. Zeteo’s Prem Thakker spoke with California Congressman Ro Khanna, who got the exclusive look at the documents, but says the government appears to be protecting specific people – including at least six powerful people from both the US and abroad.

The files where survivors “made statements implicating rich and powerful men who raped these underage girls” are redacted, the congressman says.

Khanna, alongside Rep. Thomas Massie, led Congress to pass the Epstein Files Transparency Act to force the release of the government’s files relating to disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein. After repeated episodes of the Department of Justice flouting the transparency standards laid out in the act, the agency said it would grant lawmakers access to unredacted files that they could view at the DOJ building. And still, Khanna reveals, the “Epstein Class,” and the Trump administration, are acting with “impunity.”

Watch our conversation with Rep. Khanna above to hear the latest revelations about the “gruesomeness” in the files and the “disgusting” tactics the government is deploying to shroud it.

*This conversation was published a week ago on zeteo.com. If you would like early access to more exclusive content like this, then head over to Zeteo’s Substack and become a paid subscriber today - your support matters!

episodes.title: Inside the Epstein Investigation With the Reporter Who Uncovered It
episodes.description:
“I know a lot of stuff, but I can't report it because the victims don't want to go public, and they're afraid. And, you know, I can't go out there and say this happened without having some proof… I just keep digging and hopefully I'll get to the truth, you know? But, this whole climate in the media is very disheartening.”

In this Substack Live, John Harwood speaks with journalist Julie K. Brown, whose investigations into Jeffrey Epstein led to his arrest in 2019. They discuss Trump’s relationship with Epstein, the files and if the Trump administration can continue to ignore calls for the full release.

The investigative reporter who broke the Epstein story in November 2018 says she believes she still hasn’t learned the full scope of crimes in this scandal involving wealthy and powerful people and the young girls who were victimized.

This Substack Live discussion published last week on zeteo.com. If you want early, exclusive access to this kind of independent, unfiltered journalism — subscribe to our Substack here: https://zeteo.com/subscribe
